subject: WM-0152 blocked
body: Public authoritative playable projection is still missing after WM-0157. Web can now send WM-0150 commands through @wuming-town/sim-worker, but the reviewed Worker protocol/session surface still exposes only RenderSnapshot/UiDelta hashes and compact summaries, not the full playable read-model needed for HUD, placement, job markers, pawn motion/progress, and blocked reasons. WM-0152 cannot truthfully replace WM-0151 playback until that projection surface exists. See coordination/reports/WM-0152.md for options and recommendation.
